value.found_quote: AI Threat Defense operationalizes this process by deploying AI security agents to help you actively hunt for deep vulnerabilities. These agents draw on multiple industry-leading frontier models via the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform... Frontier models can uncover complex logic flaws, risky trust boundaries, vulnerable dependencies, exposed APIs, and chains of lower-severity issues that combine into exploitable paths... Wiz's AI, context-aware, pen-testing agent simulates attacks to identify and validate complex exploitable paths, including application-layer and identity-driven risks traditional testing often misses.
value.rationale: The page substantiates the claim that Google offers security scanning/threat model capabilities that scan code and agent actions for security issues. The page describes Google AI Threat Defense as a platform that uses AI agents and frontier models to scan code repositories, CI/CD pipelines, AI platforms and models, and agent actions for deep vulnerabilities (logic flaws, risky trust boundaries, vulnerable dependencies, exposed APIs), and validates exploitability against real-world threat context — which directly maps to "scanning code/agent actions for security issues against a threat model." The offering is presented as a current announcement (introduced May 27, 2026), indicating active/general availability status.
